description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a metallic body accented by red and black coloration, and a wooden pistol grip. The receiver is topped with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the body displays a series of yellow shell indicators along the side. The dual-barrel configuration is prominent, with both barrels running parallel beneath a vented rib, and a tubular magazine is visible below the barrels. The fore-end is textured for grip, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing protection for the trigger. The overall appearance suggests a modern, combat-oriented shotgun suitable for urban environments.
description: A tactical, dual-barrel shotgun with a metallic body, red accents, and a wooden pistol grip, featuring a Picatinny rail and visible shell indicators.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels, vented rib, and the sight post aligned above the barrels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the Picatinny rail, yellow shell indicators, and the wooden pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrels and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dual barrels, shell indicators, and the overall tactical profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with a vented rib and equal barrel lengths
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
